content:
🚀 Antibot-Detector | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with real-time insights into the bot detection and anti-scraping mechanisms employed by websites, aiding security researchers and web developers.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time detection of anti-bot systems, CAPTCHAs, and fingerprinting • Multi-layer detection system (DOM, Network, Payload, JS Hooks, Window Properties) • Support for major anti-bot systems (Cloudflare, Akamai, DataDome, etc.)
📖 Summary: This Chrome extension detects and analyzes various anti-bot systems, CAPTCHAs, and browser fingerprinting techniques in real-time. It provides users with confidence scores, detection history, and advanced tools to understand how websites protect themselves from automated access.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
